_about: Inputs for the github-slugger snapshot. Regenerate slug_fixtures.json via 'make regen-slug-fixtures' whenever this file changes. See IMPL-0006 Phase 3 and INV-0002 #Findings for the rationale behind each category. Categories are intentionally redundant with internal/slug/slug_test.go: the unit suite proves rfc-api's port matches its OWN spec; this suite proves rfc-api matches UPSTREAM github-slugger byte-for-byte.

collision_groups.name: duplicate_h2_thrice
collision_groups._comment: Three identical headings — emit base, base-1, base-2.

collision_groups.name: pre_existing_suffix_advances_past
collision_groups._comment: After Notes-1 is manually fed, the next Notes must skip to notes-2.

collision_groups.name: case_insensitive_collision
collision_groups._comment: NOTES and notes both slug to 'notes' — second collides.

collision_groups.name: mixed_script_repeats
collision_groups._comment: Cyrillic headings preserve their letters via \p{L}; repeats still collide.

collision_groups.name: distinct_headings_no_suffixing
collision_groups._comment: Different bases must not get spurious suffixes.
